//_readme: Pure protocol registration worker configuration. Runtime paths are managed by Grok2API.
// captcha_preflight_timeout: Health-check timeout per solver endpoint before a batch starts.
// captcha_endpoint_concurrency: Concurrent tasks per endpoint. Docker deployment overrides it with TURNSTILE_THREAD.
// captcha_failure_threshold: Consecutive failures per endpoint and proxy route before cooldown.
// captcha_prefetch: Solve while waiting for email verification to reduce serial latency.
